---
title: 'Writing CoDependatly'
date: '2020-09-10T01:12:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5852359463652771233'
blogger_filename: '/2020/09/writing-codependatly.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<p>&nbsp;My writing says "I need you to like me".&nbsp;</p><p>Soft acceptance, this is where you are but you can do better.</p><p>Autobiographically, you are there to show yourself. You're either naked or secluded. Naked transparency involves apologies.&nbsp;</p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p>
